title: M28 Magic Tracking Rifle
description: A rifle used by Eir from the game MementoMori.
body:
![M28 Magic Tracking Rifle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08b83944c065827f322a9286ced30395cca09f8a.png)

# How does it work?
Rename a crossbow to "M28 Magic Tracking Rifle". No mods required!

# It doesn't work!
Make sure you use the right version.

# Want to see more?
Consider supporting me on Kofi or __commission__ me! Because of medical reason, a lot of jobs are more difficult for me to do. Having supporters motivates me to continue making models.

# Eir is so cool!
I knowww.
